title: Desert Pillager Wall
description: Adds a Desert Pillager Wall outpost with loot and rewards to desert biomes
body:
**This mod adds a Desert Pillager Wall outpost with loot and rewards to desert biomes.**

![Wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8af6a4ddb9bfa18830c425c9d8def1f5c7b9ee17.jpeg)

**Spawns:**

The outpost only generates in desert biomes.

**Illagers:**

The Desert Wall outpost is occupied by Pillagers and Vindicators.


![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28c30128cd452091d2097ae04ab0964664668176.jpeg)

**Loot:**

The towers of the outpost contain valuable items as rewards for anyone who defeats the Illagers.

 


Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
